originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Sells Off, Oil Prices Spike On Trump Blockade; Micron, Sandisk, SK Hynix, SpaceX Dive
summary: Dow Jones Futures: The Nasdaq composite sold off Monday on Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade. Micron, Sandisk, SK Hynix and SpaceX dived.
content: Dow Jones Futures: The Nasdaq composite sold off Monday on Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade. Micron, Sandisk, SK Hynix and SpaceX dived.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货：纳斯达克抛售，特朗普封锁导致油价飙升；美光、Sandisk、SK 海力士、SpaceX Dive
chineseSummary: 道琼斯期货：纳斯达克综合指数周一因特朗普封锁霍尔木兹海峡而遭到抛售。美光、Sandisk、SK 海力士和 SpaceX 纷纷跳水。
chineseContent: 道琼斯期货：纳斯达克综合指数周一因特朗普封锁霍尔木兹海峡而遭到抛售。美光、Sandisk、SK 海力士和 SpaceX 纷纷跳水。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
